commands.review_summary:
This PR tightens voice-call realtime WebSocket routing to the exact configured path or slash-delimited children and adds regression coverage for sibling-prefix rejection and root stream-path children.

PR surface: Source +11, Tests +118. Total +129 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: yes. by source inspection: current main and v2026.6.5 use `pathname.startsWith(pattern)`, so `/voice/stream/realtime-evil` matches `/voice/stream/realtime`. I did not run tests because this review is read-only.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] No code repair lane is needed right now; the remaining blocker is contributor real behavior proof plus maintainer acceptance of the compatibility-sensitive route tightening.

target.title: fix(voice-call): require realtime websocket path boundary
target.body:
Summary:
- Tightens realtime voice WebSocket upgrade routing so same-prefix sibling paths are not routed to the realtime handler.
- Previously, /voice/stream/realtime-evil matched /voice/stream/realtime because the matcher used startsWith(pattern).
- The matcher now accepts only the exact configured path or a real child path under it.
- Preserves the existing root realtime streamPath="/" behavior so root child paths such as /token still route to the realtime handler.

Validation:
- Added regression coverage for sibling realtime WebSocket paths.
- Added regression coverage for root realtime WebSocket child paths.
- node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run extensions/voice-call/src/webhook.test.ts
- node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run extensions/voice-call/src/webhook.test.ts extensions/voice-call/src/webhook/realtime-handler.test.ts

Redacted local proof:
- After the patch, the sibling path regression exercises GET /voice/stream/realtime-evil with Upgrade: websocket and confirms the realtime handler is not called.
- After the root-path follow-up, the root path regression exercises GET /token with realtime.streamPath="/" and confirms the realtime handler is called once.
- The focused webhook test shard and related realtime-handler shard both pass locally.
target.author: jason-allen-oneal
